name: PickerInputWithinAView
summary: The PickerInputWithinAView class is the base class of PickerInput instances that represent a valid pick of point(s) or object(s) in a view.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: PickedView
properties.summary: The view within which the pick occurred.
